events.name: standard_crud_events
events.description: Standard CRUD events for all models

template.content: Standard CRUD events for {{modelName}} with V3.1 attributes format

events.name: relationship_events
events.description: Relationship-specific events for models with relationships

template.content: Relationship-specific events for {{modelName}} with parent/child/many-to-many relationships

events.name: lifecycle_events
events.description: Lifecycle transition events for models with state management

events.name: validation_events
events.description: Validation-related events for models with validation requirements

events.name: profile_events
events.description: Profile attachment events for models supporting profiles

template.content:
ProfileAttachedTo{{modelName}}:
  description: "Profile was attached to {{modelName}}"
  attributes:
    {{modelName.toLowerCase}}Id: UUID required
    profileType: String required
    profileData: Object required
    profileVersion: String default=1.0
    attachedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required
    validationPassed: Boolean required

ProfileDetachedFrom{{modelName}}:
  description: "Profile was detached from {{modelName}}"
  attributes:
    {{modelName.toLowerCase}}Id: UUID required
    profileType: String required
    detachedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required
    reason: String optional
    dataPreserved: Boolean default=false

ProfileUpdatedOn{{modelName}}:
  description: "Profile was updated on {{modelName}}"
  attributes:
    {{modelName.toLowerCase}}Id: UUID required
    profileType: String required
    changedFields: String optional
    previousValues: Object optional
    newValues: Object required
    profileVersion: String required
    updatedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required

{{modelName}}SyncedToExternal:
  description: "{{modelName}} was synchronized to external system"
  attributes:
    id: UUID required
    externalSystemId: String required
    externalId: String required
    syncType: String required  # create, update, delete
    syncStatus: String required  # success, failed, partial
    syncTimestamp: DateTime required
    dataSnapshot: Object optional
    errorDetails: Object optional

{{modelName}}SyncFromExternal:
  description: "{{modelName}} was synchronized from external system"
  attributes:
    id: UUID optional
    externalSystemId: String required
    externalId: String required
    syncType: String required
    syncStatus: String required
    conflictResolution: String optional
    dataChanges: Object optional
    syncTimestamp: DateTime required

{{modelName}}ExternalSyncFailed:
  description: "{{modelName}} external synchronization failed"
  attributes:
    id: UUID optional
    externalSystemId: String required
    syncType: String required
    failureReason: String required
    errorDetails: Object required
    retryCount: Integer default=0
    nextRetryTime: DateTime optional
    timestamp: DateTime required

events.name: business_process_events
events.description: Business process events for complex models

template.content:
{{modelName}}ProcessingStarted:
  description: "{{modelName}} business processing started"
  attributes:
    id: UUID required
    processType: String required
    processId: UUID required
    processParameters: Object optional
    startedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required
    estimatedDuration: Integer optional

{{modelName}}ProcessingCompleted:
  description: "{{modelName}} business processing completed"
  attributes:
    id: UUID required
    processType: String required
    processId: UUID required
    processingResults: Object required
    duration: Integer required
    completedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required
    sideEffects: String optional

{{modelName}}ProcessingFailed:
  description: "{{modelName}} business processing failed"
  attributes:
    id: UUID required
    processType: String required
    processId: UUID required
    failureReason: String required
    errorDetails: Object required
    partialResults: Object optional
    failedBy: UUID required
    timestamp: DateTime required
    recoverable: Boolean required
